messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The launcher overwrites git-tracked files in every role worktree on each launch — this is the phantom-revert root cause
What it solves: THE PHANTOM REVERT IS NOT A MYSTERY ANY MORE. This ticket does not ask anyone to go looking for a
mechanism. I found it, and I verified every step of it on disk. Six occurrences on 2026-07-14 alone
(architect x2, coder, hardener, cleaner), each one restored by hand, each one filed as "cause
unknown…
How it works: Launching a swarm does not modify a git-tracked path in a role worktree
